description_long: This coupe car features a compact, classic design with a two-door body and a slightly sloped rear, giving it a sporty yet practical appearance. The exterior is predominantly white with gold accents, including racing stripes running from the hood to the trunk, a stylized sunburst motif on the hood, and gold trim on the wheels, bumpers, and rear spoiler. The car has a hardtop roofline and four visible side windows, with the front and rear windshields providing clear visibility. The wheels are simple and round, matching the gold detailing found throughout the vehicle. The doors, hood, and trunk are all outlined, indicating functional separations for access. The overall build suggests a lightweight, urban-friendly coupe suitable for city driving and parking.
description: A white coupe car with gold racing stripes, sunburst hood motif, and gold trim, featuring a hardtop roof and two doors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two-door configuration, gold wheels, and gold-accented rear spoiler.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the gold sunburst motif on the hood, gold bumper, and dual headlights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the two-door layout, gold wheels, and visible rear spoiler.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the gold-accented bumper, rear spoiler, and the continuation of the gold racing stripes.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows per side
